root.sql: select * from (select a.*,rowNum m_rowNum from ( select to_char(first_result ,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w1, to_char(first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w2, ac_rule_name w3, case when relation_type =4 then '衍生关联' when relation_type =1 then '主次关联' else '-' end w4, case when in_user_flag='1' then '是' else '否' end w5, parent_alarm_num w6, sub_alarm_num w7, parent_alarm_num w8, case when org_alarm_event_time is null then '-' else rtrim(to_char(org_alarm_event_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')) end w9, '正常' w10 from tpa_alarmrelation_jt_sum where tpa_alarmrelation_jt_sum.first_result >=to_date('#time1#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tpa_alarmrelation_jt_sum.first_result <=to_date('#time2#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and sum_level=#sum_level# )a ) Where m_rowNum > #BegeinIndex# and m_rowNum <= #EndIndex#
root.countsql: select count(*) from ( select to_char(first_result ,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w1, to_char(first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w2, ac_rule_name w3, case when relation_type =4 then '衍生关联' when relation_type =1 then '主次关联' else '-' end w4, case when in_user_flag='1' then '是' else '否' end w5, parent_alarm_num w6, sub_alarm_num w7, parent_alarm_num w8, case when org_alarm_event_time is null then '-' else rtrim(to_char(org_alarm_event_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')) end w9, '正常' w10 from tpa_alarmrelation_jt_sum where tpa_alarmrelation_jt_sum.first_result >=to_date('#time1#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tpa_alarmrelation_jt_sum.first_result <=to_date('#time2#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and sum_level=#sum_level# )
